name: Chocolate Nut-Filled Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a bowl, mix together the shortening and sugar until smooth.
3. Add the eggs and beat well.
4. Gradually add flour, baking powder, and salt, mixing until combined.
5. Scoop batter into cookie sheets lined with parchment paper.
6. Bake for 12-15 minutes or until golden brown.
7. Remove from oven and allow to cool on wire racks.
